items.name: cua
items.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

items.name: qwen-code
items.description: An open-source AI agent that lives in your terminal.

items.name: agenticmail
items.description: Email & SMS infrastructure for AI agents — send and receive real email and text messages programmatically

items.name: awesome-agentic-ai-zh
items.description: AI Agent 中文學習地圖 — 從零開始的結構化學習路徑，每階段有必做練習跟必修閱讀。三語對照（繁中／简中／English）。歡迎社群一起貢獻、優化內容。

items.name: notebooklm-py
items.description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

items.name: osaurus
items.description: Own your AI. The native macOS harness for AI agents -- any model, persistent memory, autonomous execution, cryptographic identity. Built in Swift. Fully offline. Open source.

items.name: refact
items.description: AI Agent that handles engineering tasks end-to-end: integrates with developers’ tools, plans, executes, and iterates until it achieves a successful result.

items.name: EvoAgentX
items.description: 🚀 EvoAgentX: Building a Self-Evolving Ecosystem of AI Agents

items.name: gemini-cli
items.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

items.name: nanobot
items.description: "🐈 nanobot: The Ultra-Lightweight Personal AI Agent"
